user.title: Connect to Kinward
user.description: Enter your Kinward backend URL and an integration service token. Create one by running this on the machine hosting Kinward (not inside Home Assistant): `docker compose exec api python -m kinward.cli create-integration-token --name "Home Assistant"`.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the Kinward backend at that URL.
error.invalid_auth: The integration token was rejected. Check the token and try again.
error.incompatible_api: This Kinward backend reports an API contract version this integration does not support.
error.household_not_configured: This Kinward backend has no household set up yet. Complete household setup first.

init.title: Model and memory connections
init.description: Choose what LLM this household's assistants use, and which of the two memory systems (Honcho for conversation memory, llm_wiki for household facts) they connect to. Leave a backend set to "none" to keep it truthfully disabled.

data.model_api_key: Model API key (leave blank to keep the current one)

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the Kinward backend at that URL.
error.invalid_auth: The integration token was rejected. Check the token and try again.
error.household_not_configured: This Kinward backend has no household set up yet.
